output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?team(COUNT(?event) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q41595 ; wdt:P136 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q59734 .
}
GROUP BY ?team
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
